subcodes.first_line: O Salman! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison, then inform the people of that which hath befallen My soul at the hands of Mine enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا سلمان اسمع ندائی عن شطر سجنی ثم اخبر الناس بما ورد علی نفسی من اعدائی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Satan; the Evil One, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @rejection, opposition and persecution
